security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; font-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: SGL UI Designer - Visual embedded GUI design tool
bundle.longDescription: A visual drag-and-drop UI design tool for the SGL lightweight embedded graphics library.
